headline: Eldorado Gold Boosts Portfolio With Acquisition of Foran
summary: EGO acquires Foran, adding two near-term producing assets and boosting exposure to gold and copper, with output set to rise and support growth.

raw.headline: Eldorado Gold Boosts Portfolio With Acquisition of Foran

headline: DuPont Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
summary: DuPont (NYSE: DD) will release its first quarter 2026 financial results at 6:00 a.m. ET on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. In addition, the company will host a conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET that day.
